3542991388.title: UPRO Stepper Portable Trainer Cardio with LCD Monitor with Drawstring Step Machine
3542991388.detail_text: ✨✨✨ Welcome to UPRO GEAR Shop！✨✨✨ Shipped from Singapore warehouse ★ We carefully inspected each item before shipment. ★ All products are in stock in Singapore ★ Local seller in Singapore ★ Fast delivery Product Description: Product Name：Premium Stepper Machine Size: 32 X 34 X 19 (CM) Material: Steel Pipe， PVC Materials Color Avaliable: Black（With Resistance Bands） DIGITAL MONITOR】: the convenient digital monitor displays: count, time, calories, total count 【TOTAL BODY WORKOUT】: upper body resistance bands provide a comprehensive workout to tone your arms, shoulders, back and chest muscles. 【ADJUSTABLE HEIGHT】: customize the height of your steps and switch between steep climbs or a high intensity quick mini step workout 【STURDY DESIG】: expert engineering and quality materials enables the total body advanced step machine to feature a max user weight of 150kg 【UNIQUE STABILIZER RING】: keep your steps steady and unshakable. the stabilizing ring on the foundation of the stepper provides added safety and a peace of mind while you focus on your fitness. 【TWISTING ACTION】: The lateral side-to-side action imparts a more fluid step motion. Product Features: 1.Dual Hydraulic Resistance System – Smooth, even resistance to protect knees and joints ( support up to 150kg ) 2.Non-Slip Wide Pedals – Stable and safe during intense workouts 3.Low Noise Design – Quiet enough to use even while baby sleeps 4.LCD Display Monitor – Track time, steps, calories burned & scan mode 5.Includes Resistance Bands – For upper body and arm toning 6.Compact & Space-Saving – Perfect for apartments, HDB, or condos What’s in the Box: 1 x Mini Stepper 2 x Resistance Bands 1 x LCD Display Unit 1 x Floor Mat
3542991388.detail_html:
✨✨✨ Welcome to UPRO GEAR Shop！✨✨✨

Shipped from Singapore warehouse

Product Description:

Product Name：Premium Stepper Machine

Size: 32 X 34 X 19 (CM)

Material: Steel Pipe， PVC Materials

Color Avaliable: Black（With Resistance Bands）

DIGITAL MONITOR】: the convenient digital monitor displays: count, time, calories, total count

【TOTAL BODY WORKOUT】: upper body resistance bands provide a comprehensive workout to tone your arms, shoulders, back and chest muscles.

【ADJUSTABLE HEIGHT】: customize the height of your steps and switch between steep climbs or a high intensity quick mini step workout

【STURDY DESIG】: expert engineering and quality materials enables the total body advanced step machine to feature a max user weight of 150kg

【UNIQUE STABILIZER RING】: keep your steps steady and unshakable. the stabilizing ring on the foundation of the stepper provides added safety and a peace of mind while you focus on your fitness.

【TWISTING ACTION】: The lateral side-to-side action imparts a more fluid step motion.

Product Features:

1.Dual Hydraulic Resistance System – Smooth, even resistance to protect knees and joints ( support up to 150kg )

2.Non-Slip Wide Pedals – Stable and safe during intense workouts

3.Low Noise Design – Quiet enough to use even while baby sleeps

4.LCD Display Monitor – Track time, steps, calories burned & scan mode

5.Includes Resistance Bands – For upper body and arm toning

6.Compact & Space-Saving – Perfect for apartments, HDB, or condos

What’s in the Box:

1 x Mini Stepper

2 x Resistance Bands

1 x LCD Display Unit

1 x Floor Mat

13803504239.title: Magnet Foot Board with Adjustable Pull Rope for Cardio Home Fitness Equipment Durable Aerobic Exercise Tool for Weight Loss and Toning
13803504239.detail_text: Torsion Body Dance Plate with Pull Rope Magnetic Massage Plate Multifunction Weight Loss Aerobic Exercise Tool Features: 1. 3D Massage Magnetic : This twist waist disc features a 3D massage magnetic design, combined with a resistance band for easy use.Allows for convenient at-home workouts, promoting fat burning and toning anytime, anywhere. 2. Resilient Elastic Resistance Rope: Incorporates a strong and resilient elastic resistance rope that engages multiple muscle groups.The torsion disc board provides a comprehensive workout from the feet to the waist, involving the whole body in the exercise. 3. ABS Plastic Construction: This magnet foot board is made from engineering-grade ABS plastic with excellent mechanical properties.Offers exceptional impact strength, wear resistance, and stability, supporting up to 100kg (220lbs) of weight. 4. Activates Acupoints: This aerobic fitness disc utilizes magnetic waves to activate acupoints the feet, stimulating different organs with microcurrent stimulation.Enhances overall well-being by targeting specific points and promoting better energy flow. 5. Smooth Rotation: This waist training board is designed with steel balls for smooth rotation and reduced friction during exercise.Ensures fluid movement and minimizes resistance, while the reinforced tendon design guarantees stability and durability. Specification: Origin: Mainland China Type of sports: Strength Training Function: Waist Application: With Cord Pull Waist Wriggling Plate Model Number: Twist Boards Department Name: Unisex Training Site: Legs,Hip,Waist Main Material: ABS Color: Purple, Green, Blue Size: 250.00mm (9.84in)*250.00mm (9.84in)*28.00mm (1.10in) Gross Weight: 500g Note: Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed the pictures. Thank you! Please allow 1-2cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement.

page_json.description: Torsion Body Dance Plate with Pull Rope Magnetic Massage Plate Multifunction Weight Loss Aerobic Exercise Tool Features: 1. 3D Massage Magnetic : This twist waist disc features a 3D massage magnetic design, combined with a resistance band for easy use.Allows for convenient at-home workouts, promoting fat burning and toning anytime, anywhere. 2. Resilient Elastic Resistance Rope: Incorporates a strong and resilient elastic resistance rope that engages multiple muscle groups.The torsion disc board provides a comprehensive workout from the feet to the waist, involving the whole body in the exercise. 3. ABS Plastic Construction: This magnet foot board is made from engineering-grade ABS plastic with excellent mechanical properties.Offers exceptional impact strength, wear resistance, and stability, supporting up to 100kg (220lbs) of weight. 4. Activates Acupoints: This aerobic fitness disc utilizes magnetic waves to activate acupoints the feet, stimulating different organs with microcurrent stimulation.Enhances overall well-being by targeting specific points and promoting better energy flow. 5. Smooth Rotation: This waist training board is designed with steel balls for smooth rotation and reduced friction during exercise.Ensures fluid movement and minimizes resistance, while the reinforced tendon design guarantees stability and durability.  Specification: Origin: Mainland China Type of sports: Strength Training Function: Waist Application: With Cord Pull Waist Wriggling Plate Model Number: Twist Boards Department Name: Unisex Training Site: Legs,Hip,Waist Main Material: ABS Color: Purple, Green, Blue Size: 250.00mm (9.84in)*250.00mm (9.84in)*28.00mm (1.10in) Gross Weight: 500g   Note: Due to the different monitor and light effect, the actual color of the item might be slightly different from the color showed the pictures. Thank you! Please allow 1-2cm measuring deviation due to manual measurement.

13801527562.title: Goyan Fitness Twister Machine with Waist Rotator Stepper Multi Function Cardio Training Equipment for Home Exercise
13801527562.detail_text: Description: 【2-in-1 Design】: This twist stepper combines waist rotating and step training in a compact fitness equipment setup, so you can switch between movements without needing multiple machines. 【Training Function】: As an exercise machine, it supports side-to-side stepping, rotating motion, and lower-muscle engagement to help make home workouts more efficient and varied. 【Stable Build】: The wide anti-slip base, doubleparallel footing system, and reinforced frame are designed to keep the waist rotator stable during use, giving you more confident workout feel. 【Workout Features】: The twist stepper offers a practical way to work on your waist, hips, and legs at home, making it easier to fit movement into busy days and maintain consistent. 【Purpose】: This waist rotating machine is designed for regular indoor exercise, helping create a simple routine for fitness training, balance training and everyday cardio routines. Specification: - Material: PP, Steel Pipe Package Includes: - 1 Fitness Twister Machine Note: - Please allow slightly errors due to manual measurement and different monitors.

672174241.title: Dontz Doorway Pull-Up Bar No Screw/Drilling, 180kg Capacity, Dual-Lock, Spirit Level, Home Gym Workout
672174241.detail_text: Product Overview Transform your doorway into a personal gym with the Dontz Doorway Pull-Up Bar ! This innovative bar requires no screws or drilling for installation, making it perfect for renters and homeowners alike. It features a built-in precision spirit level meter for accurate adjustment and a reinforced 4-layer steel bar capable of holding up to 180kg . Designed for ultimate safety, it includes a dual-lock system and anti-slip rubber padding to ensure stable and secure workouts. The high-quality, comfortable EVA sponge grip provides a firm hold, making your pull-ups and chin-ups more effective. Durable, sturdy, and wear-resistant, the Dontz Pull-Up Bar is an essential addition to any home gym. Main Features & Benefits Easy No-Drill Installation: Set up your home gym instantly with easy installation that requires no screws or drilling . Perfect for apartments and homes where drilling is not allowed or desired. Built-in Spirit Level Meter: Features a built-in precision spirit level meter for accurate and balanced installation, ensuring the bar is perfectly horizontal and safe for use. High 180kg Load Capacity: Constructed with a reinforced 4-layer steel bar , providing exceptional strength and stability with an impressive load capacity of up to 180kg . Dual-Lock System & Anti-Slip Safety: Equipped with a dual-lock system and anti-slip rubber padding on both ends, offering enhanced safety and preventing slippage during intense workouts. Comfortable EVA Sponge Grip: The bar is covered with a high-quality and comfortable EVA sponge grip , ensuring a firm, comfortable, and sweat-absorbing hold for better performance and reduced hand fatigue. Durable & Wear-Resistant: Made from a combination of PVC, EVA, and sturdy steel , guaranteeing a durable, sturdy, and wear-resistant product that will last through countless workouts. Product Specifications Product Models (Length Options): 70 ~ 95cm 95 ~ 125cm 115 ~ 145cm Product Weight (approx.): 2.23kg (for 70~95cm model) 2.7kg (for 95~125cm model) 3.03kg (for 115~145cm model) Max Load Capacity: 180kg Product Material: PVC + EVA + Steel What’s In The Box 1x Dontz Doorway Pull-Up Bar (selected size) 1x Chinese Manual Book Before Buying This Product, Please Take Note That: Product color may slightly vary due to photographic lighting sources or your monitor settings. Due to manual measurement, dimensions will be varied by about 5%. For more about product inquiries and warranty, please approach our customer services. #Dontz #PullUpBar #DoorwayPullUpBar #NoDrillPullUpBar #HomeGym #WorkoutEquipment #ChinUpBar #FitnessGear #StrengthTraining #UpperBodyWorkout #IndoorGym #BodyweightFitness #ExerciseBar
672174241.detail_html:
Product Overview

Transform your doorway into a personal gym with the Dontz Doorway Pull-Up Bar! This innovative bar requires no screws or drilling for installation, making it perfect for renters and homeowners alike. It features a built-in precision spirit level meter for accurate adjustment and a reinforced 4-layer steel bar capable of holding up to 180kg.

Designed for ultimate safety, it includes a dual-lock system and anti-slip rubber padding to ensure stable and secure workouts. The high-quality, comfortable EVA sponge grip provides a firm hold, making your pull-ups and chin-ups more effective. Durable, sturdy, and wear-resistant, the Dontz Pull-Up Bar is an essential addition to any home gym.

Main Features & Benefits

  • Easy No-Drill Installation: Set up your home gym instantly with easy installation that requires no screws or drilling. Perfect for apartments and homes where drilling is not allowed or desired.

  • Built-in Spirit Level Meter: Features a built-in precision spirit level meter for accurate and balanced installation, ensuring the bar is perfectly horizontal and safe for use.

  • High 180kg Load Capacity: Constructed with a reinforced 4-layer steel bar, providing exceptional strength and stability with an impressive load capacity of up to 180kg.

  • Dual-Lock System & Anti-Slip Safety: Equipped with a dual-lock system and anti-slip rubber padding on both ends, offering enhanced safety and preventing slippage during intense workouts.

  • Comfortable EVA Sponge Grip: The bar is covered with a high-quality and comfortable EVA sponge grip, ensuring a firm, comfortable, and sweat-absorbing hold for better performance and reduced hand fatigue.

  • Durable & Wear-Resistant: Made from a combination of PVC, EVA, and sturdy steel, guaranteeing a durable, sturdy, and wear-resistant product that will last through countless workouts.

product.desc:
Product Overview

Transform your doorway into a personal gym with the Dontz Doorway Pull-Up Bar! This innovative bar requires no screws or drilling for installation, making it perfect for renters and homeowners alike. It features a built-in precision spirit level meter for accurate adjustment and a reinforced 4-layer steel bar capable of holding up to 180kg.

Designed for ultimate safety, it includes a dual-lock system and anti-slip rubber padding to ensure stable and secure workouts. The high-quality, comfortable EVA sponge grip provides a firm hold, making your pull-ups and chin-ups more effective. Durable, sturdy, and wear-resistant, the Dontz Pull-Up Bar is an essential addition to any home gym.

Main Features & Benefits

  • Easy No-Drill Installation: Set up your home gym instantly with easy installation that requires no screws or drilling. Perfect for apartments and homes where drilling is not allowed or desired.

  • Built-in Spirit Level Meter: Features a built-in precision spirit level meter for accurate and balanced installation, ensuring the bar is perfectly horizontal and safe for use.

  • High 180kg Load Capacity: Constructed with a reinforced 4-layer steel bar, providing exceptional strength and stability with an impressive load capacity of up to 180kg.

  • Dual-Lock System & Anti-Slip Safety: Equipped with a dual-lock system and anti-slip rubber padding on both ends, offering enhanced safety and preventing slippage during intense workouts.

  • Comfortable EVA Sponge Grip: The bar is covered with a high-quality and comfortable EVA sponge grip, ensuring a firm, comfortable, and sweat-absorbing hold for better performance and reduced hand fatigue.

  • Durable & Wear-Resistant: Made from a combination of PVC, EVA, and sturdy steel, guaranteeing a durable, sturdy, and wear-resistant product that will last through countless workouts.

Product Specifications

  • Product Models (Length Options):
    • 70 ~ 95cm
    • 95 ~ 125cm
    • 115 ~ 145cm
  • Product Weight (approx.):
    • 2.23kg (for 70~95cm model)

    • 3.03kg (for 115~145cm model)
  • Max Load Capacity: 180kg
  • Product Material: PVC + EVA + Steel

2959728856.detail_text: 🎈Color: Red black/gray black 🎈Material: Enhanced PP 🎈Dimensions: 68 x 28 x 15cm/81 x 28 x 20cm 🎈single set of five layers of yellow box packaging 🎈 Adjustable height level: 10cm/15cm 🎈Maximum bearing weight: 250kg/300kg 🎈Warranty period: 6 months 〖Package included〗 1 x Aerobic Stepper 🎈Features🎈 🎈Using engineering plastics, sturdy and durable, no pollution.Free height adjustment according to your own requirements.Great for working out at home, it's easy to use and helps tone up your legs.It can be assembled and disassembled freely, and the operation is simple.Surface dot structure design, stronger anti-skid and higher safety performance.Suitable for aerobic exercise, weight loss, progressive exercise, strength training. 🎈3 Adjustable Height Exercise Steps: Our exercise stepper has 3 adjustable heights, 10cm, 15cm and 20cm. it's lightweight and easy to carry. The steps of the Exercise Steps platform allow you to adapt to different exercises and exercises and perform more intense training. 🎈Strong and durable material: The aerobic pedal platform is made of high-quality PP material, which is wear-resistant and durable, has a solid structure and strong load-bearing capacity. The platform can carry up to 250/300kg, so you have nothing to worry about and you can train with confidence. 🎈Anti-slip design: The upper surface of the aerobic step platform has a dot anti-slip and shock-absorbing design. There is an anti-slip rubber seal on the bottom, which improves resistance and effectively avoids anti-slip problems. The home training equipment provides better support and traction, making it more durable. 🎈Multiple uses: This step training boot can not only be used for sensory training, exercising body balance and coordination, but also for leg shaping, buttocks tightening, stretching exercises, waist thinning, plank support and parent-child interaction. Adjustable quilting for workout training to help you lose weight and improve muscle strength and endurance. 🎈Detachable and hidden storage design, can be disassembled, hidden design at the bottom, will not take up space and hide the storage. The step platform is ideal for adults and children to train together. Improves interactivity, improving understanding and enthusiasm between parents and children.

page_json.description: Exercise Equipment for Home: Whether you want to do pull-ups and push-ups at home or in the office, you can use this pull-up bar to perform various exercises at the same time. Pull Up Assist Band: Heavy-duty steel frame, non-slip foam grips, easy to install and remove. Lifefitness Trainer: This doorway bar is a great fitness equipment for men and women. Lifefitness Workout: You can burn more calories and fat, making your body healthier and increasing blood circulation. VQ Vanquish Fitness: The high-density pull-up bar provides a comfortable exercise experience, which can support the upper and lower body to strengthen and tone the upper body. Made of durable thick steel pipe-more safety. Thick EVA foam handle, sweat absorption, comfortable. Safety spiral lock design, prevent loosening. Easy to assemble, easy to remove. Variety of possible exercises-push-up, chin-up, sit-up, leg stretch, twist, twist the waist, leg swing

product.desc:
Description:


【Ultimate Relaxation】Crafted from smooth with anti-drop straps, our Device your relaxation experience. Enjoy a deeper, more rejuvenating sleep with customizable massage options tailored to your needs.


【Effortless Portability】Designed for on-the-go relaxation, this Device induces calmness in just 20 minutes. Lightweight and versatile, it's perfect for home, office, or travel use, ensuring relaxation whenever, wherever.


【Revolutionize Relaxation】Bid farewell to restless nights and embrace deep relaxation with the device. Elevate your sleep experience and achieve profound relaxation like never before.


【Simplicity Meets Style】It isn't just effective—it's a statement of simplicity and style. Fast USB charging allows convenient use anytime. Seamlessly switch between low and high frequency modes with intuitive controls for personalized relaxation.


【Thoughtful Wellness Gift】Enhance sleep quality with just 20 minutes of daily use. Whether for yourself, a loved one, or a colleague, this thoughtful gift promises a significant impact on overall health and well-being.

3130913910.title: Ayuqi® Aerobic Stepper Cardio Fitness Home Gym Exercise Step Block Board Height Adjustable Aerobic Stepper
3130913910.detail_text: ❤ Hi there! Welcome to my Shop ! ⚡ Fast Shipping！ Don't miss！ 🚚 Delivery time >> 2-3days 💬 If you have any questions, you can chat with us at any time ! ❤ Thank you! Product Details ✅Using engineering plastics, sturdy and durable, no pollution.Free height adjustment according to your own requirements.Great for working out at home, it's easy to use and helps tone up your legs. ✅【Strong and durable material】The aerobic pedal platform is made of high-quality PP material, which is wear-resistant and durable, has a solid structure and strong load-bearing capacity. The platform can carry up to 200kg. ✅【Anti-slip design】The upper surface of the aerobic step platform has a dot anti-slip and shock-absorbing design. There is an anti-slip rubber seal on the bottom, which improves resistance and effectively avoids anti-slip problems. ✅Detachable and hidden storage design, can be disassembled, hidden design at the bottom, will not take up space and hide the storage. ✅【Multiple uses】This step training boot can not only be used for sensory training, exercising body balance and coordination, but also for leg shaping, buttocks tightening, stretching exercises, waist thinning, plank support and parent-child interaction. Adjustable quilting for workout training to help you lose weight and improve muscle strength and endurance.
3130913910.detail_html:
❤ Hi there! Welcome to my Shop ! ⚡ Fast Shipping！ Don't miss！ 🚚 Delivery time >> 2-3days 💬 If you have any questions, you can chat with us at any time ! ❤Thank you!

Product Details

✅Using engineering plastics, sturdy and durable, no pollution.Free height adjustment according to your own requirements.Great for working out at home, it's easy to use and helps tone up your legs.

✅【Strong and durable material】The aerobic pedal platform is made of high-quality PP material, which is wear-resistant and durable, has a solid structure and strong load-bearing capacity. The platform can carry up to 200kg.

✅【Anti-slip design】The upper surface of the aerobic step platform has a dot anti-slip and shock-absorbing design. There is an anti-slip rubber seal on the bottom, which improves resistance and effectively avoids anti-slip problems.

✅Detachable and hidden storage design, can be disassembled, hidden design at the bottom, will not take up space and hide the storage.

✅【Multiple uses】This step training boot can not only be used for sensory training, exercising body balance and coordination, but also for leg shaping, buttocks tightening, stretching exercises, waist thinning, plank support and parent-child interaction. Adjustable quilting for workout training to help you lose weight and improve muscle strength and endurance.
